textByHash.00a7fe9c7648e3682057affc0ec143842c852400: Firstly, I can create a one-on-one encounter with an adversary you've defeated in your adventures. People like to practice in these dreams.
textByHash.0173951aaec9d90d7adcdc33bed7ff4b2ab002ca: After you've asked me to set up a dream, put some money in my coffer. I'll deduct the fee from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.07a339bdf8ab88d738c0ece00fa4273484508851: I had to find out what this dream meant and if it was a vision of the future or not.
textByHash.0d45c0d5f9df07b005e69ae6c861477cc1c2ebaf: And finally there's something I like to call a Rumble, where you face multiple adversaries at the same time. I imbue a bit more magic and shake the vial harder to create that one!
textByHash.104a276022a951fe0afe56b7b70bd76020c7aaca: I set off to travel the world, discovering more about dreams to enable me to understand the dream I'd had as a child.
textByHash.1356c6382a432b0df2c110102ae96d61bc91b032: My original plan came to me in a vivid dream when I was younger you see, I saw myself running a successful business from a great structure in a strange land.
textByHash.146667b2282aaa62af087eac6d1cbd56ca3ccbbb: Welcome to the Nightmare Zone! Would you like me to create a dream for you?
textByHash.160e97d740306d4843f5ff6d237b5ff0ee38ebf5: Truth be told, that name wasn't my first choice, it's what the local folk have been calling it and so it sort of stuck.
textByHash.1849eb09cb5151fa05f201a4168d8cc7133627b3: I've already created a dream for you. Do you want me to cancel it?
textByHash.1c321b70354d0cfe9d9af922c4e71b81ac8428a7: For a Rumble dream, hard mode, I'll want 6,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.24b00964d5d4b14ee49ab98ebb31c0eda51efeeb: For the Endurance and Rumble dreams, I charge a fee for my work. I don't like handling the money directly, so instead I've set up a secure coffer.
textByHash.25202c2eec75dbb0573ce57da302f7c8af5722c9: Well, I say strange, but I'd never left Lunar Isle at the time and this place was very hot and dry, unlike anything I'd seen before.
textByHash.2b6a9e2cb9ef83ebd91c6b74a542538edb79ceca: Oh yes, Nigel played a crucial role in the whole debacle. It's all very amusing now that I think back to it.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2d36d56ad071cbdde82c50996149138b97ec975c: My name's Dominic Onion but you can call me Dom, or Mr Onion.
textByHash.30669bc6ed8d30c6a360f3e187c1b312d85d273e: I imbue a bit of magic, then give the vial a bit of a shake, and when you drink it you'll be able to re-live an encounter close to the original.
textByHash.30706dccd9bb2e12264320b6dd78af0ad226d06d: Don't worry though, when you're in a dream, you're perfectly safe even if it does seem very real.
textByHash.30c37b8dd9a416d40b2e3e6a06fe64ec4ecdf393: Finally here's one other option you get, and that's how difficult the encounters are. As well as the normal dreams, the bravest adventurers can choose a harder version*.
textByHash.30da217202eb82ad8e4083d1b29134cd972fc952: I then take the essence of these memories and put that in the vial you see on the plinth.
textByHash.36da34e8e418c78562ed45f380f6b3b2f0d66b59: Well that's a long story...but I can tell you that it involved my parents, 3 blurberry specials, and a chinchompa.
textByHash.418be96537335e7ffce43bbae9289d8ec6be0c01: It's all part of my five year plan, and who knows, perhaps my dream will come true; I'll discover this place and build Dom Onion's Tower!
textByHash.4a8b2087e529142fe1643be3c017df88671a6069: For a Rumble dream, normal mode, I'll want 2,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.4f3dfd0f82e2d19ea72061ea0e8908203d657231: For a customisable Rumble dream, normal mode, I'll want 12,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.58ff743085d2e6af261992c16c646f0cd50fb700: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight. I'll deduct 1,000 coins from the coffer when you do.
textByHash.59e677e95df79fc68f1928b676987e8f1ff2c374: I needed to know what this dream meant and if it was truly a vision of the future.
textByHash.679131bf736da76a56b2042f1fa7604babc61fb2: Oh no, they can vary wildly! You can choose from one of three main options.
textByHash.6997f3428865f50f6bea5c2894d9e24c65493129: Okay, I've emptied the vial. I have not taken any money from you for that dream, since you never started it.
textByHash.6e9f4dd181f2ae128b0dae233b7b5f663c384bd7: Then there's a sort of Endurance dream, where you face enemies in encounter after encounter, and try to survive to the end.
textByHash.72419c0b8047bdbaa0601ef8d488c1226648fd66: You haven't started that dream I created for you. Can I help you with something?
textByHash.7b13a042d386ec62b828bf84a04fa819902a6dc8: That's why I've setup this small business venture in the mean time selling dreams to people. I just need a big enough crowd to kickstart my business.
textByHash.8230688476d85dc2706b9d61eb7e1867b9602f28: If you sucessfully overcome the dream or die trying, you'll leave the dream state and return to normal with your grey matter and appendages intact.
textByHash.8a11d9e3e3375771f3c1b03dbc01af4541afa9c7: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 2,000 coins deposited first.
textByHash.8b2e84942db0f09bddb41bdc118c7ec6ab513288: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 12,000 coins deposited first.
textByHash.8bf7637c94ed7c333361444ded8d9c60ae4716b1: If so I knew I had to try and find this location and build the huge tower I saw.
textByHash.900789f8e24c758b8250dadcd009df4741685a90: Certainly. You can practice for free, but the larger dreams require more skill to imbue the potions and so there's a fee for those.
textByHash.9a6e856dd8182b0c9fc50dad8a15bd5b99fdef8c: Growing up, I studied hard to find out more about magic, especially oneiromancy and the interpretation of dreams.
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.ac3dd6c0556abd5232fc36bbd992171af42d27e0: Having learned as much as I could on Lunar Isle I set out to find and learn from other great wizards I'd heard of in stories as a child.
textByHash.acb9e16af6ef1765cdc91c9acee6f63f2ef0c02e: Don't worry, it's not as bad as it sounds...most of the time.
textByHash.b39608a10f0345a4f6289931b0ed77cb1bad2f5b: Okay. Drink from the vial when you're ready to start the dream.
textByHash.b471dcb5d0f8c75fed87f99d38cd87a467ee252c: For an Endurance dream, normal mode, I'll want 1,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.baf67e18c578ced0cf997806e922d80e3f42e50b: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight.
textByHash.c180712f61c94918215a7e5e811b3bc7da8320f1: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 6,000 coins deposited first.
textByHash.c8fbef00a6ab484f95475bfeb641741c05536092: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight. I'll deduct 5,000 coins from the coffer when you do.
textByHash.c96ed3f705e109948c9591de9b4617d6d76f372a: For a customisable Rumble dream, hard mode, I'll want 16,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.cdda4878c1dbe0f3ef979f615450a20adcc56643: You can invite friends to fight alongside you in a Rumble dream. Once I've set up the dream for you, step into the enclosure and invite up to 4 friends.
textByHash.d917b9042a7f6342fd0ca2462757352f31414a56: For an Endurance dream, hard mode, I'll want 5,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.
textByHash.da8e735eb1aa98d45a05b1a0af4c2049a17989c7: There's a red vial on the other plinth. Your friends can drink from it to enter your dream as a spectator to observe your progress.
textByHash.e658c6bbed4d016100d711dd5f95fd2a6a6dbf4c: When I told my father about the dream he laughed and said I should become a banker like him and his father before him but in that moment I knew that it wasn't the life for me.
textByHash.e8241dbe58a5ba594437a3dede1e0ced8da6946c: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 16,000 coins deposited first.
textByHash.e970ebeecc3744f2f0a7586be5937ea34619c6f9: Certainly. I can delve into your memories and search for the key events that have affected you on your adventures.
textByHash.ebfc9fea49444e370c0a7c41fbe375de1c8bc976: I was going to call it 'Dom Onion's Tower', but I've not found this strange place or gathered enough money to build it just yet.
